THE FLORIDA KEYS WILD BIRD CENTER IS A NOT-FOR-PROFIT 501(C)3 CONSERVATION ORGANIZATION DEDICATED TO THE RESCUE, REHABILITATION, AND RELEASE OF NATIVE AND MIGRATORY WILD BIRDS THAT HAVE BEEN HARMED OR DISPLACED.
